response.justification: While Bogdan has over 15 years of diverse software engineering and entrepreneurial experience, he lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise and Director-level strategic leadership required for this Principal AI Strategy role. His AI experience is limited to a brief 6-month stint, which falls significantly short of the preferred qualifications for advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge AI technologies.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and open-source projects.
Entrepreneurial experience as the Founder of GISCollective, demonstrating product ownership and technical innovation.
Strong background in mentoring and sharing insights through workshops, public talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Very limited exposure to Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, with only 6 months of recent AI-agent tooling experience.
Lacks Director-level strategic leadership and enterprise advisory experience, having primarily operated at the Senior/Staff IC level.
Does not possess an advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field or recognized industry expertise in AI platforms.
